description:
Panasonic Sanyo CCTV Network Cameras versions 1.02-05 and 2.03-0x are 
vulnerable to CSRFs that can be exploited to allow an attacker to 
perform changes with administrator level privileges.
Claude Reasoning: The affected network cameras belong to a professional CCTV product line sold into commercial and institutional surveillance rather than consumer retail. The cross-site request forgery flaw is deployment-independent, so exclusion rests on the product line's market.
